title: CHECK constraint using COLLATE with CASE or BETWEEN
poc: CREATE TABLE t1(a CHECK(1 COLLATE BINARY BETWEEN 1 AND 1));
CREATE TABLE t1(a CHECK(CASE 'abc' COLLATE nocase WHEN a THEN 1 END));
CREATE TABLE t1(a CHECK(1 COLLATE BINARY BETWEEN 1 AND 1));
key_bug_features: CHECK constraint with COLLATE and CASE or BETWEEN operator
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(a TEXT CHECK(a COLLATE BINARY BETWEEN 'A' AND 'Z'));
CREATE TABLE t2(b INTEGER CHECK(CASE b WHEN 1 COLLATE NOCASE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END));
